name: Apex Spine and Neurosurgery
message: Apex Spine and Neurosurgery specializes in the comprehensive neurosurgical treatment of spinal and cranial disorders. The team consists of neurosurgeons who offer treatment options, including minimally invasive spine surgery, tailored to the needs of their patients. They serve patients from across Georgia, particularly Atlanta, and emphasize a patient-centered approach. Their services cover a wide range of conditions, including back pain, brain tumors, and trauma.
